name: RadiologyRoleCS
title: Radiology Role
description: Radiology workflow roles in German ambulatory radiology. Covers technical (MTR) and physician roles needed for imaging workflow tracking (acquisition, reading, supervision, sign-off).

concept.definition: Medizinisch-Technische Radiologieassistentin / Medizinisch-Technischer Radiologieassistent — performs image acquisition
Radiologin / Radiologe — general radiologist performing or supervising examinations
Befundende Radiologin / Befundender Radiologe — responsible for interpreting images and dictating/signing reports
Supervisierende Radiologin / Supervisierender Radiologe — provides oversight and final approval, e.g. for residents
